Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Thomas J. Brandi, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Edward R.C. Beck, father and guardian ad litem for person with at disability: Constance Beck.
